sourceTitle: Notification to Students on the Use of AI Tools in Classes (ver 1.0)
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Information entered into AI tools can potentially be used in some form for AI training. Never input confidential information, personal information, or unpublished research results, as the information might be leaked.
